---
title: "Hello, Quarto Python!"
format: html
jupyter: python3
---

## A simple plot

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

x = np.linspace(0, 2 * np.pi, 100)
y = np.sin(x)

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 4))
plt.plot(x, y)
plt.title("Sine Wave")
plt.xlabel("x")
plt.ylabel("sin(x)")
plt.grid(True)
plt.show()
```

## Compute

```{python}
result = sum(range(1, 101))
print(f"The sum of 1 to 100 is {result}")
```
